Instagram

CGI

Brunch Festival 25

Summer collided with pixels in an Instagram promo created for Brunch Festival, bringing the Forum stage to life as a digital playground.

Project info

Role
CG Artist
Type
Personal Project
Tools
C4D Octane

Concept

Summer collided with pixels for Brunch Festival 25.

The piece transforms the Forum into a digital playground, using full-CG stage work, graphic energy and sound-driven rhythm to translate the festival's summer atmosphere into a short-form promo built for Instagram.

Next project →

© Marcos Bodi
